title: Square knot (reef knot)
description: A binding knot for joining two ends of similar thickness: cinching a duffel, fabric, or shoelaces. Needs a careful pattern — tied wrong, it becomes a self-slipping granny knot.
steps: Cross the right end over the left and tuck it under.
With the same end (now on the left), cross it over the other and tuck under again.
Tighten — both ends should exit the knot parallel to the standing parts.
